Citi Innovation Labs, Classiq and AWS partnered to explore the use of quantum algorithms for complex financial problems.

Citi Innovation Labs has partnered with the quantum software company Classiq to explore portfolio optimization solutions, according to [a blog post on the AWS website](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/quantum-computing/citi-and-classiq-advance-quantum-solutions-for-portfolio-optimization/).

The collaboration between Citi's expertise in finance and Classiq's quantum software development platform aimed to bridge the gap between quantum computing and financial applications, according to the post.
As quantum technology continues to evolve, partnerships like the one between Citi, Classiq, and Amazon Braket are crucial for unlocking its potential in industries like finance.
